confirmations.send_instructions: You will receive an email with instructions about how to confirm your account in a few minutes.
confirmations.send_paranoid_instructions: If your email exists on our database, you will receive an email with instructions about how to confirm your account in a few minutes.

failure.inactive: Your account was not activated yet.
failure.last_attempt: You have one more attempt before your account will be locked.
failure.timeout: Your session expired, please sign in again to continue.
failure.unauthenticated: You need to sign in or sign up before continuing.
failure.unconfirmed: You have to confirm your account before continuing.

confirmation_instructions.instruction: You can confirm your account email through the link below:
confirmation_instructions.subject: Confirmation instructions

email_changed.message: We're contacting you to notify you that your email has been changed to %{email}.
email_changed.message_unconfirmed: We're contacting you to notify you that your email is being changed to %{email}.
email_changed.subject: Email Changed

password_change.message: We're contacting you to notify you that your password has been changed.
password_change.subject: Password Changed

reset_password_instructions.instruction: Someone has requested a link to change your password, and you can do this through the link below.
reset_password_instructions.instruction_2: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.
reset_password_instructions.instruction_3: Your password won't change until you access the link above and create a new one.
reset_password_instructions.subject: Reset password instructions

unlock_instructions.instruction: Click the link below to unlock your account:
unlock_instructions.message: Your account has been locked due to an excessive amount of unsuccessful sign in attempts.
unlock_instructions.subject: Unlock Instructions

omniauth_callbacks.failure: Could not authenticate you from %{kind} because "%{reason}".

passwords.no_token: You can't access this page without coming from a password reset email. If you do come from a password reset email, please make sure you used the full URL provided.
passwords.send_instructions: You will receive an email with instructions about how to reset your password in a few minutes.
passwords.send_paranoid_instructions: If your email exists on our database, you will receive a password recovery link on your email
passwords.updated: Your password was changed successfully. You are now signed in.

registrations.destroyed: Bye! Your account was successfully cancelled. We hope to see you again soon.

edit.leave_blank_if_you_don_t_want_to_change_: leave blank if you don't want to change it
edit.title: Edit %{resource}
edit.we_need_your_current_password_to_confirm: we need your current password to confirm your changes

registrations.signed_up: Welcome! You have signed up successfully.
registrations.signed_up_but_inactive: You have signed up successfully. However, we could not sign you in because your account is not yet activated.
registrations.signed_up_but_locked: You have signed up successfully. However, we could not sign you in because your account is locked.
registrations.signed_up_but_unconfirmed: A message with a confirmation link has been sent to your email address. Please open the link to activate your account.
registrations.update_needs_confirmation: You updated your account successfully, but we need to verify your new email address. Please check your email and click on the confirm link to finalise confirming your new email address.
registrations.updated_but_not_signed_in: Your account has been updated successfully, but since your password was changed, you need to sign in again.

unlocks.send_instructions: You will receive an email with instructions about how to unlock your account in a few minutes.
unlocks.send_paranoid_instructions: If your account exists, you will receive an email with instructions about how to unlock it in a few minutes.
unlocks.unlocked: Your account has been unlocked successfully. Please sign in to continue.
